description: Accounts. Parts of pages from an account book, numbered 17-20, with a fold down the middle of the bifolio. Mentioning Bar Ṣedaqa ha-Levi, Muḥammad al-Ghazāwī, Avraham Shalom and ʿAbd al-Raḥmān al-Ghazāwī and the months Rajab, Shaʿbān, Ramaḍān, Shawwāl and Dhū l-Qaʿda. (Information from CUDL) Paleographically datable to the 16th century or later.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
